claim: White House NSM-10 requires federal civilian agencies to submit inventories related to quantum-vulnerable cryptographic systems.

source.title: National Security Memorandum on Promoting United States Leadership in Quantum Computing While Mitigating Risks to Vulnerable Cryptographic Systems

verified_points: NSM-10 directs the United States to begin the multi-year process of migrating vulnerable computer systems to quantum-resistant cryptography.

Section 3(c)(iv) requires OMB, in consultation with CISA, NIST, the National Cyber Director, and NSA, to establish requirements for inventorying currently deployed cryptographic systems, excluding National Security Systems.

Section 3(c)(v) requires heads of Federal Civilian Executive Branch agencies, within 1 year of the memorandum and annually thereafter, to deliver to the Director of CISA and the National Cyber Director an inventory of IT systems that remain vulnerable to CRQCs.

The required inventories should include current cryptographic methods used on IT systems, including administrator protocols, software and firmware that require upgraded digital signatures, and other key assets.
scope_limits: The direct NSM-10 submission requirement in section 3(c)(v) is scoped to Federal Civilian Executive Branch agency IT systems that remain vulnerable to CRQCs, with focus on High Value Assets and High Impact Systems.
National Security Systems have a separate path under NSA National Manager guidance in sections 3(c)(x) through 3(c)(xiii).
For detailed inventory data items and the May 4, 2023 first submission implementation, cite OMB M-23-02 rather than NSM-10 alone.
presentation_guidance: It is accurate to say NSM-10 made cryptographic inventory a federal action item for PQC migration.
For precision, say FCEB agencies must submit inventories of IT systems that remain vulnerable to CRQCs, and those inventories should include current cryptographic methods.
Do not describe NSM-10 as a direct requirement for every public or private organization to submit all cryptographic assets.

related_policy.title: OMB M-23-02, Migrating to Post-Quantum Cryptography
related_policy.relationship: Operationalizes NSM-10 for prioritized cryptographic-system inventory reporting.
